positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for zaha_hadid_premise_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~is_design_style_of(X0,zaha_hadid) | is_design_style(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    is_design_style_of(X0,kelly_wearstler) | ~is_design_style(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~is_design_style_of(X0,kelly_wearstler) | is_design_style(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    is_design_style_of(X0,zaha_hadid) | ~is_design_style(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define adores(X0,X1) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_evocative(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_dreamy(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_interesting_geometries(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_brutalist(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define design_by(X0,X1) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
